# GrabMaps Playground - Beautiful Mapping Solutions

![key](/assets/images/key-icon.svg)**API key:** Try it sandboxes and embedded live demos call the proxy with your key. [Create your API key](/developer/admin) in the Dashboard if you do not have one.

Foundation

## Initializing a map

Spin up the same base scene we use on /my-maps, then decide whether you stay in the builder or drop to MapLibre.

Mode 1

### GrabMaps Library (recommended)

Builder-first toggles for navigation, attribution, coverage, and labels—ideal when you want parity with the AI workspace.

```javascript
const client = new window.GrabMaps.GrabMapsBuilder()
  .setBaseUrl('https://maps.grab.com')
  .setApiKey(import.meta.env.VITE_BRAGMAPS_KEY)
  .build();

const map = new window.GrabMaps.MapBuilder(client)
  .setContainer('map')
  .setCenter([103.8198, 1.3521])
  .setZoom(12)
  .enableNavigation()
  .enableLabels()
  .enableBuildings()
  .enableAttribution()
  .build();
```

Reuse the same client instance across multiple MapBuilder or SearchBuilder invocations to avoid redundant auth handshakes.

Mode 2

### MapLibre GL JS

Keep low-level control of sources and layers while still pointing at Grab tiles.

```javascript
// Fetch map style with Bearer token authentication
fetch('https://maps.grab.com/api/style.json?theme=basic', {
  headers: {
    'Authorization': 'Bearer bm_your_api_key_here'
  }
})
.then(response => response.json())
.then(style => {
  const map = new maplibregl.Map({
    container: 'map',
    style: style,
    center: [103.8198, 1.3521],
    zoom: 12,
  });

  map.addControl(new maplibregl.NavigationControl(), 'top-right');
});
```

Live demo

### Try the initialization scene

Validate your API key, attribution, and tiles in the same HTML we host publicly.

<iframe src="/api/demos/map-examples/html/library/basic-initialization.html" title="Basic Map Initialization" class="rounded"></iframe>

[![launch](/assets/images/launch-icon.svg)Open in new tab](/api/demos/map-examples/html/library/basic-initialization.html)

Config knobs

### Map options you'll touch most

`center`

\[lng, lat\] starting viewport

`zoom`

0-22. SEA city zooms live between 10-15

`pitch`

0-60. Use 45° to match /my-maps hero scenes

`bearing`

Rotate to match marketing shots

`minZoom / maxZoom`

Clamp user exploration area

`maxBounds`

Restrict panning to a bounding box

Compose features

### Builders you can stack after init

Search and routing reuse the same GrabMaps client.

```javascript
const client = new GrabMapsBuilder().setBaseUrl(baseUrl).setApiKey(key).build();

const map = new MapBuilder(client).setContainer('map').enableAttribution().build();

const search = new SearchBuilder(client)
  .setContainer('search-box')
  .onPlaceSelected((place) => map.flyTo([place.lng, place.lat], 16))
  .build();
```

API Reference

## Map & tile endpoints

Endpoints used when initializing a map.

GET`/api/style.json`

Map style JSON for MapLibre with auth. Supports theme param: basic, dark, satellite.

themebasicdarksatellite

```javascript
// Fetch map style with Bearer token authentication
fetch('https://maps.grab.com/api/style.json?theme=basic', {
  headers: {
    'Authorization': 'Bearer bm_your_api_key_here'
  }
})
.then(response => response.json())
.then(style => {
  const map = new maplibregl.Map({
    container: 'map',
    style: style,
    center: [103.8198, 1.3521],
    zoom: 12,
  });

  map.addControl(new maplibregl.NavigationControl(), 'top-right');
});
```

Try it

#### Response format

```json
{
  "version": 8,
  "sources": { "map": { "type": "raster", "tiles": ["..."], ... } },
  "layers": [...]
}
```
